productName: Ooowee - JUICED 1G Infused PreRoll - Khalifa Kiwi - Late Bloomer - 1g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Khalifa Kiwi flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — a tangy kiwi flavor, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
